signals.npcLine: Crypto markets shudder; pulse fades across neon bazaars.
signals.questPulse: Scan for dips; old coins lose grip in shadowed streets.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits bleed; digital ledgers flicker with fear.
signals.clueEvent: Market cap contracts—a ghost in the machine stirs.

signals.npcLine: Data nodes report rising tension around BTC shadows.
signals.questPulse: Extract intel on key cryptos; volatility spikes in dark net.
signals.worldFeed: Network whispers: dominant currency stumbles, rivals circle.
signals.clueEvent: Trending chip tokens overheating; watch for sudden crashes.

signals.npcLine: Fear index climbs—cyber traders jitter in the gloom.
signals.questPulse: Trace market cap vulnerabilities; exploit uncertainties in coin flow.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptoverse unstable: thousands of assets flickering at once.
signals.clueEvent: Signal: microdecay in digital asset integrity detected.

signals.npcLine: New tokens rise but lack trust; a gamble in neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Chase volatile tokens RAVE and SPK; uncover hidden patterns.
signals.worldFeed: Exchanges teem with unstable currency flares amid market gloom.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented trade volumes hint at unseen manipulations.

signals.npcLine: Old netrats mumble about fading yields; caution thick as smog.
signals.questPulse: Engage with street brokers; rumors point to breaking cycles.
signals.worldFeed: Digital rumors trace shifting alliances in crypto syndicates.
signals.clueEvent: NPC chatter marks timing of market tremors.
